Name: Kacey
Family_Details: Family of six; mentions mom, dad, twin brother, and sister; dad drives in Joburg and comes to visit.
Home_Details: Lives in Gonubie, East London; says the house is big and she has her own room.
Hobbies_Interests: Playing with dad, boxing on a boxing bag, watching TV.
Unique_Detail: Mentions her dad lives/drives in Joburg and visits.
Writing_Strengths: Personal detail; clear topic relevance; attempts multiple ideas under each heading.
Writing_Needs: Sentence punctuation, capitals, and clearer sentence separation.
Comment_Seed: Kacey writes warmly about her family and daily life, and she includes personal details that make her writing feel genuine and engaging.

Name: Sienna
Family_Details: Lives with mom, dad, and brother; says her brother is very funny and her parents are kind.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, South Africa, in Stirling; says she loves it there.
Hobbies_Interests: Playing marimba, playing with friends, making slime.
Unique_Detail: Combines music interest with social play and creative play.
Writing_Strengths: Simple, clear ideas; warm tone; good relevance to headings.
Writing_Needs: Grammar control and sentence expansion for fuller detail.
Comment_Seed: Sienna shares friendly, positive ideas in her writing and writes especially well when describing the people and activities she enjoys.

Name: Skyla
Family_Details: Lives with mom, dad, and little sister; says her sister is silly and naughty; mom is a teacher.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, South Africa, in Gonubie; lives close to her friend.
Hobbies_Interests: Sits on her dad’s lap and drives the car on the farm, swimming, playing with her friend.
Unique_Detail: Memorable farm/car detail and proximity to friend.
Writing_Strengths: Interesting personal detail; memorable voice; covers all headings meaningfully.
Writing_Needs: Punctuation, grammar, and tighter sentence structure.
Comment_Seed: Skyla writes with personality and includes memorable details from her life, especially when writing about family and the activities she enjoys.

Name: Iyolatha
Family_Details: Family of seven; mentions dad, mom, sisters, brother, and herself; says they love spending Christmas, Easter, and birthdays together.
Home_Details: Lives in Beacon Bay; says the home has eleven rooms and is filled with love and memories.
Hobbies_Interests: Hockey, netball, water polo, swimming; also singing.
Unique_Detail: Uses emotional language such as 'filled with love and memories.'
Writing_Strengths: Rich content; strong elaboration; expressive ideas.
Writing_Needs: Editing for sentence accuracy and clearer list punctuation.
Comment_Seed: Iyolatha writes with strong feeling and detail, and she shows a lovely ability to describe both family life and the activities that are important to her.

Name: Pratik
Family_Details: Enjoys spending time with family, playing chess with dad, helping mom cook dinner, and playing pranks.
Home_Details: Lives in East London; home is near Bellome/Bellome? School; says the house is very small.
Hobbies_Interests: Sketching cars, riding his bike, hide-and-seek with sister.
Unique_Detail: Chess with dad and sketching cars stand out.
Writing_Strengths: Clear sense of personality; engaging hobbies; good personal relevance.
Writing_Needs: Spelling and place-name clarity; stronger sentence endings.
Comment_Seed: Pratik brings personality into his writing and includes enjoyable personal details, especially about family activities and the hobbies he values.

Name: Paige
Family_Details: Family of four: mom, dad, brother, and herself; mentions mom is 41 years old.
Home_Details: Lives in East London in a white house at number 10 Robert Street next to her aunties’ and uncles’ house.
Hobbies_Interests: Dancing, painting, and spending time with friends and family.
Unique_Detail: Says dancing moves her body and painting calms her down.
Writing_Strengths: Thoughtful explanation; self-awareness; clear ideas with detail.
Writing_Needs: Grammar polish and punctuation consistency.
Comment_Seed: Paige writes with warmth and self-awareness, especially when describing the activities she enjoys and why they matter to her.

Name: Unako
Family_Details: Writes about beach outings with family; playful family image of putting sand on dad to make him a merman.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, in Bonnie Doon; says the house is two stories tall.
Hobbies_Interests: Singing after school, netball on Mondays, hockey on Thursdays.
Unique_Detail: Funny beach 'merman' detail makes the writing memorable.
Writing_Strengths: Creative storytelling; energetic voice; strong memorable detail.
Writing_Needs: Sentence control and editing for clarity.
Comment_Seed: Unako writes with imagination and humour, and this helps the writing feel lively, personal, and memorable.

Name: Selethu
Family_Details: Introduces self by name and says the family is cool and likes travelling.
Home_Details: Lives in Beacon Bay, North, South Africa and close to cousin.
Hobbies_Interests: Rugby and soccer; does not like golf.
Unique_Detail: Clear preference statement about sports and not liking golf.
Writing_Strengths: Direct communication; clear interests; stays on topic.
Writing_Needs: Needs fuller paragraphs and more detail under each heading.
Comment_Seed: Selethu communicates clearly and confidently in writing and shows a strong sense of personal preference when sharing interests and family life.

Name: IBA
Family_Details: Family of four; dad does not live with them but is still counted; mentions aunt.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, Winterstrand; small house with outdoor garage, indoor garage, and a small pool.
Hobbies_Interests: Soccer, hockey, water polo, cricket, rugby; also listening to music.
Unique_Detail: Detailed home description with two garages and pool.
Writing_Strengths: Detailed content; strong factual information; many ideas.
Writing_Needs: Sentence punctuation and some grammar control.
Comment_Seed: IBA includes many interesting details in writing and shows confidence when sharing information about both home life and personal interests.

Name: Amanle
Family_Details: Lives with mom, dad, brother, and two sisters; names siblings; says 'I love my family.'
Home_Details: Lives in Nahoon; says there is a double-storey home and a flat.
Hobbies_Interests: Water polo, soccer, hockey, cycling, running.
Unique_Detail: Very sport-focused profile with several active hobbies.
Writing_Strengths: Clear interests; personal warmth; strong relevance.
Writing_Needs: Needs more detail and stronger sentence construction.
Comment_Seed: Amanle writes honestly and clearly about family and sport, and shows strong enthusiasm for active hobbies.

Name: Luke
Family_Details: Family of four: himself, sister, mom, and dad.
Home_Details: Lives in a double-storey house near a church; white house with number 34.
Hobbies_Interests: Maths, playing chess with dad, watching Ninja Sport Network, monkey bars.
Unique_Detail: Maths and chess with dad create a clear personal snapshot.
Writing_Strengths: Good factual detail; clear sense of interest; strong personal relevance.
Writing_Needs: Spelling and sentence punctuation.
Comment_Seed: Luke shares clear personal details in his writing and writes especially well when describing the activities he enjoys at home and in his free time.

Name: Olama
Family_Details: Has mom, dad, sister, and younger sister; enjoys talking with mom and playing games with sisters.
Home_Details: Lives in Gonubie in a double-storey house by a railway/railway?; mentions traffic and two sisters.
Hobbies_Interests: Cycling, gymnastics, swimming, running; does not like tennis; mentions cross-country and games such as Snakes and Ladders and ping pong.
Unique_Detail: Interesting mix of sport and board games.
Writing_Strengths: Plenty of content; energetic ideas; attempts elaboration.
Writing_Needs: Editing for clarity, spelling, and sentence organisation.
Comment_Seed: Olama has many ideas to share and brings energy to writing, especially when describing family interactions and a wide range of interests.

Name: Unknown_Student_01
Family_Details: Oldest child in the house; has two dogs named Maggie and Maverick; one sister named Sohana/Sohona who is turning eight.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, South Africa, in Woodleigh/Woodleigh? in a two-storey house.
Hobbies_Interests: Art and crafts, hockey, cross-country, swimming, biathlon.
Unique_Detail: Dog names and sister turning eight are memorable anchors.
Writing_Strengths: Detailed and personal; good use of specific names.
Writing_Needs: Learner name missing from photo; some grammar and punctuation refinement needed.
Comment_Seed: This learner includes specific and memorable details in writing, which helps the piece feel personal and easy to connect with.

Name: Peyton
Family_Details: Family of four; says they spend most of their time together; dad has six jobs and is very busy; mom works at Merrifield; learner goes to Merrifield.
Home_Details: Lives in Gonubie near Kat Sam swimming academy; also mentions living on a farm in Queenstown and a three-storey house there / bed-and-breakfast detail.
Hobbies_Interests: Water polo, hockey, swimming, netball, dancing with Skyla, art.
Unique_Detail: Mom works at Merrifield and dancing with Skyla stands out.
Writing_Strengths: Lots of detail; expressive and conversational voice; meaningful personal content.
Writing_Needs: Sentence control and organisation of ideas.
Comment_Seed: Peyton writes with enthusiasm and plenty of detail, making the writing feel personal, lively, and full of interesting real-life connections.

Name: Wona/Zantsi
Family_Details: Youngest in a family of four; lives with sister, mom, dad, and a dog.
Home_Details: Lives near the airport in the Eastern Cape and by George Randell; says never late for a flight.
Hobbies_Interests: Cycling on many days of the week; netball, water polo, hockey.
Unique_Detail: Funny line about never being late for a flight.
Writing_Strengths: Creative personal detail; strong sporty identity.
Writing_Needs: Name unclear; sentence editing and grammar support needed.
Comment_Seed: This learner writes with humour and energy, and includes strong personal details that help the reader picture everyday life clearly.

Name: Culiwethu
Family_Details: Family of five; likes spending time with family and going to the beach; has two siblings and is the older sibling between brother and sister.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, South Africa, Beacon Bay; lives in a double-storey house with five bedrooms.
Hobbies_Interests: Swimming, hockey, singing in room.

Writing_Strengths: Clear family context; good structure across headings.
Writing_Needs: Minor grammar and punctuation refinement.
Comment_Seed: Culiwethu writes clearly about family life and shows warmth when describing time spent with loved ones and favourite activities.

Name: Ampile
Family_Details: Family of six with brother, two sisters, mom, and dad; includes ages of siblings and self.
Home_Details: Lives in Beacon Bay near a garage, down the hill by a spa and Spar, in a double-storey home.
Hobbies_Interests: Sports, singing, gaming, playing outside, swimming, riding bike.

Writing_Needs: Sentence accuracy and punctuation polish.
Comment_Seed: Ampile writes with a strong sense of detail and enjoys sharing specific information, which gives the writing depth and individuality.

Name: Uluthando
Family_Details: Lives with family of five; likes spending time with family.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, South Africa; Beacon Bay is home; lives in a double-storey house.
Hobbies_Interests: Drawing, painting, swimming, gymnastics.

Comment_Seed: Uluthando writes clearly about home and hobbies and shows a lovely balance between creative and active interests.

Name: Zingce
Family_Details: Family of five; youngest with two older brothers, mom, and dad; says the family is wild.
Home_Details: Lives in East London and Butterworth; in East London near Hudson Park / Cambridge and in Butterworth near a dam.
Hobbies_Interests: Dance, singing, netball, eating; favourite food is sushi.

Writing_Needs: Grammar polish and sentence structure refinement.

Name: Iyanna
Family_Details: Lives with family of four; oldest sister of twin sisters; has a Yorkie named Yoddie/Yodie.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, Beacon Bay, in a double-storey house with five rooms and four bathrooms.
Hobbies_Interests: Golf, swimming, art, drama, scouts, nature, camping.

Writing_Needs: Editing for grammar and sentence flow.
Comment_Seed: Iyanna writes with maturity and detail, and she brings a wide range of interests into her writing in an engaging way.

Name: Hermione
Family_Details: Family loves music; dad plays piano, guitar, and drums; mom plays piano; sister plays flute; learner plays piano, drums, and guitar.
Home_Details: Lives in Beacon Bay, East London, in a double-storey house with four bathrooms and four bedrooms.
Hobbies_Interests: Playing piano; soccer, netball, water polo, swimming, cross-country; reading Matilda, Dork Diaries, and Diary of a Wimpy Kid.

Writing_Needs: Needs editing for run-on sentences and punctuation.
Comment_Seed: Hermione writes with richness and confidence, and her wide interests in music, reading, and sport make her writing especially engaging.

Name: Oliver
Family_Details: Oldest in the family; little sister is a 'drama queen'; humorous comment that mom hates homework.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, Bonza Bay, in a three-storey house in South Africa.
Hobbies_Interests: The game 'Subnautica', flying a drone, likes his house.
Unique_Detail: Drone and gaming details give a distinctive modern profile.
Writing_Strengths: Humorous voice; memorable phrasing; clear interests.
Writing_Needs: Sentence formation and fuller development under headings.
Comment_Seed: Oliver’s writing shows humour and originality, and he shares personal interests in a way that makes his voice easy to recognise.

Name: Aripo
Family_Details: Mom is a lawyer; dad works at Fort Hare.
Home_Details: Lives in East London, Beacon Bay, in a single-storey house.
Hobbies_Interests: Acting, playing piano, chess.
Unique_Detail: Strong performing-arts and chess combination.
